name: Scientific Simulation Workflows
summary: Plan, check, and triage common scientific simulation workloads on HPC systems.
description: This skill helps users prepare reviewable scientific simulation runs across molecular dynamics, CFD, weather, electronic-structure, computational chemistry, and multiphysics software by checking inputs, recording scheduler and runtime context, creating run notes, and scanning logs before scaling to production.

tools.name: command
tools.notes: Shell builtin used to check optional simulation executable availability.

tools.name: sbatch
tools.notes: Optional Slurm submit command recorded as a suggested launch path.

tools.name: qsub
tools.notes: Optional PBS submit command recorded as a suggested launch path.

tools.name: bsub
tools.notes: Optional LSF submit command recorded as a suggested launch path.

inputs.name: simulation_software
inputs.description: Scientific software family or executable being planned, such as GROMACS, LAMMPS, OpenFOAM, WRF, Quantum ESPRESSO, CP2K, VASP, Gaussian, ORCA, COMSOL, ANSYS, or Abaqus.

inputs.name: input_manifest
inputs.description: Whitespace-separated list of input paths to check before creating or launching a run plan.

inputs.name: simulation_command
inputs.description: Reviewed command line for a small smoke run or production launch. The example records it and only runs it when explicitly requested.

inputs.name: scheduler_template
inputs.description: Optional Slurm, PBS, or LSF script template to record with suggested submit commands.

inputs.name: log_files
inputs.description: Simulation stdout, stderr, or application log files to scan for common failure signals.

inputs.name: output_dir
inputs.description: Directory for generated run plans, reproducibility notes, command logs, and log triage reports.

outputs.name: simulation_run_plan
outputs.description: Markdown run plan recording software, scheduler context, command, input checks, launch notes, and post-processing notes.

outputs.name: input_check_report
outputs.description: Presence checks for declared simulation input paths before a job is submitted or scaled.

outputs.name: reproducibility_notes
outputs.description: Runtime context with hostname, working directory, scheduler variables, thread settings, MPI/GPU environment signals, and optional module hints.

outputs.name: simulation_log_triage
outputs.description: Compact log scan report with matched line numbers, issue categories, severity, and suggested follow-up checks.

outputs.name: postprocess_plan
outputs.description: Reviewable record of intended lightweight post-processing commands and generated artifacts.

examples.title: Create a plan-only simulation run packet
Scan simulation logs for common failure signals

tests.description: Validate the manifest and referenced examples.
Generate a plan-only packet without submitting a job or running a simulation command.
Scan an existing simulation log and summarize common failure signals without modifying inputs or outputs.
